summary: Iteration 157: Branching Resonance Gates + Nexus Intent + UI Enhancements - ALL TESTS PASSED (15/15 backend, all frontend UI verified). New features: 3 Resonance Gates (Purge/Root/Void) for Dream Realm entry, Nexus Intent widget on Dashboard with pre-filled action buttons, gate_chosen field in history, TypewriterText component, TransitionShader, haptic feedback. Regression tests for Nexus page and Cosmic Weather widget passed.
seed_data_creation: Multiple abandoned realms with different gates (purge, root, void) created during testing. Active realm exists with Purge gate selected.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Branching Resonance Gates fully implemented. Three gates: purge (fire/metal, active style), root (earth/wood, passive style), void (water, meditative style). Nexus Intent endpoint at /api/nexus/intent returns state=drift or state=balanced with pre-filled action recommendations. Key data-testids: gate-purge, gate-root, gate-void, gate-selection, nexus-intent-widget, nexus-intent-action, enter-dream-realm. History shows gate_chosen field. CSS variables for elements: --el-wood, --el-fire, --el-earth, --el-metal, --el-water.

GET /api/dream-realms/active (choosing s.details: Returns status=choosing with gates object containing purge, root, void. Each gate has name, subtitle, description, color, elements, style, biome_preview, challenge_count

POST /api/dream-realms/choose-gate (purg.details: Creates active realm with biome.gate=purge, gate_style=active

POST /api/dream-realms/choose-gate (root.details: Creates active realm with biome.gate=root, gate_style=passive

POST /api/dream-realms/choose-gate (void.details: Creates active realm with biome.gate=void, gate_style=meditative

POST /api/dream-realms/abandon (choosing.details: Works for both active and choosing status realms

After abandon, GET active generates new.details: New realm with status=choosing and gates object is generated

POST /api/dream-realms/complete-challeng.details: Challenge completion works correctly after gate selection

GET /api/nexus/intent.details: Returns state=drift with element, direction, action (label, path, icon), frequency (hz, label), confidence, warning, harmony, cycle

GET /api/dream-realms/history (gate_chos.details: History shows gate_chosen field for realms that had a gate selected

Frontend Gate Selection UI.details: Three gate portals (Purge, Root, Void) displayed with biome preview, challenge count, descriptions

Frontend Nexus Intent Widget.details: Dashboard shows nexus-intent-widget with element drift info, pre-filled action button (Flow Quests | 432 Hz), Dream button

Frontend Active Realm with Distortion.details: Realm card shows biome name, typewriter narrative, element chips, escape gauge, difficulty badge, challenges, distortion rules

Frontend History Tab (gate_chosen).details: History items show 'Gate: purge/root/void' for realms with gate selected

Nexus page regression.details: Nexus page loads correctly with harmony gauge, element rings, decay freshness, imbalances

Cosmic Weather widget regression.details: Dashboard cosmic weather widget shows Aries Season, lunar phase, AI forecast
